title: Brand Spectrometer Atlas
description: Standard structure ingested by the Brand Spectrometer web tool. One atlas = one brand read across eight perceptual dimensions for N>=2 cohorts. Cross-constraint (enforced by the tool, not expressible in JSON Schema): every cohorts[].vector and every distances row/column has length == dims.length, and distances is symmetric with a zero diagonal.

brand.description: Display name of the brand being read.

atlas.description: Short slug id for the atlas.

checksum.description: Optional integrity token computed as 'BSx-<nCohorts>-<nDims>-<round(sum of all cohort vector entries * 10)>'. The tool recomputes and warns on mismatch.

dims.description: The perceptual dimensions, in a fixed canonical order shared by every cohort vector. For the eight canonical keys (semiotic, narrative, ideological, experiential, social, economic, cultural, temporal) provide ONLY the key — the tool hardcodes the label, description, and colour by key and overrides any supplied values, so users cannot substitute them.

key.description: Canonical dimension key. label/desc/color are supplied by the tool for canonical keys.

color.description: Optional hex colour. Ignored (overridden) for canonical keys; auto-assigned for custom keys.

cohorts.description: Each cohort's inferred specification vector across dims (canonical order).

color.description: Optional hex colour. If omitted, the tool auto-assigns one from a palette.

vector.description: One score per dim, 0-10, in canonical dim order. Length MUST equal dims.length. This is how STRONGLY each dimension registers (size of the meaning), NOT approval.

valence.description: Optional per-dimension sentiment, -1 (negative) .. +1 (positive). Same length and order as vector. Lights up the Sentiment (L2) dial: the dot's position on each line. A single AI read can provide this.

ci_95.description: Optional per-dimension 95% confidence interval [low, high] on the 0-10 scale. Same length/order as vector. Lights up the Resolve (L3) dial (the halo). Produced by the multi-run pipeline; a single read CANNOT estimate it (do not fabricate).

emission.description: Optional per-dimension signal strength / salience, 0..1. Same length/order as vector. Lights up the Cloud (L4) dial as line weight.

valence_spread.description: Optional per-dimension spread of valence across sources, 0..1. Same length/order as vector. At the Cloud (L4) dial the valence dot becomes a horizontal distribution cloud whose width scales with this. Produced by the pipeline.

reflections.description: Optional per-dimension array of per-source reflection readings (the ghost dots at the Cloud (L4) dial). Outer length == dims.length; each inner array is that dimension's individual source readings (0-10). Produced by the pipeline.

distances.description: N x N pairwise cohort distance (1 - cosine similarity), same order as cohorts. Symmetric, zero diagonal.

per_pair_sn.description: Optional per-pair signal-to-noise: whether a pair's distance clears its noise floor.
